reviews.comment:
Malísimo el sándwich que venden.. puro pan .. carisimo.. recomiendo parar a comer a 1 km de distancia que hay una YPF y MOSTAZA en el medio de la ruta para ambos sentidos

(Translated by Google)
The sandwich they sell is terrible... just bread... very expensive... I recommend stopping to eat 1 km away where there is a YPF and MUSTARD in the middle of the route for both directions.
